summary: Despite ongoing research into TIM-3 as an investigational immune checkpoint, there is currently no clinical evidence demonstrating its effectiveness in treating NSCLC. Therefore, TIM-3 is not considered a valid therapeutic target in NSCLC according to available scientific literature.
